description: Seatpin is an online marketplace for buying and selling tickets to sports, music, theatre, and other live events. It offers event discovery, seller listings, and buyer protection for ticket transactions.
summary: Seatpin exposes a public MCP server at `https://www.seatpin.com/api/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was discoverable from the site or llms docs, though the domain also exposes OAuth authorization, token, and dynamic client registration endpoints for protected resources.
